description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a modern, boxy design and a flat roof. The front features a covered porch with columns, a driveway leading to an attached single-car garage, and a small landscaped yard with trees and shrubs. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light. The backyard includes a wooden deck, a small swimming pool, outdoor seating, and additional landscaping. The exterior is finished in light-colored siding with contrasting trim, and the property is surrounded by paved and green areas. The house is situated in a typical urban or suburban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, attached garage, landscaped yard, and backyard pool. Features large windows, a covered porch, and outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, attached garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and transition to the backyard with visible pool and outdoor seating.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the wooden deck, swimming pool, outdoor furniture, and large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, driveway, and a clear view of the backyard amenities and landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with columns, single front door, steps, and minimal decorative trim
